case_title: DAVID LIEBERMAN VS. DAVID A. MAST

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MAST, DAVID A.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-22-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAST, DAVID A.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,766.73 FILED BY LIEBERMAN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT MAST, DAVID A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIEBERMAN, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAST, DAVID A. $883.42 PRINCIPAL, $168.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,051.42, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1,766.83; AND ALLOCATES 50% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO EACH PARTY. THIS JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
